gaps.finding: Current lesson/vocabulary/grammar records have no syllabusVersion or sourceIds.
No lessons; levels are empty placeholders.
Effective HSK1 is labeled 150 words without explicit legacy HSK 2.0 version.
Global object, inline renderer and V75 runtime override prevent safe lazy modular loading.
No versioned assessment blueprint, final assessment reference or explained answer schema.
No exact/normalized/near-duplicate checker; current audit cannot produce trustworthy question duplicate counts.
No owned audio manifest, speaker metadata, transcript gating or missing-audio validation.
Legacy dictionary has 10978 records, 114 fewer than official standard total, and no per-record provenance.
No separate performance rubrics for levels 7, 8 and 9 while preserving the official combined 7–9 vocabulary band.
No compatibility mapping from legacy lesson IDs/completion keys to canonical lesson IDs.
